meaning: underground palace (as part of imperial tomb)
sentence: 考古队发现了陵墓的地宫入口。
pinyin: Kǎogǔ duì fāxiàn le língmù de dì gōng rùkǒu.
english: The archaeology team discovered the entrance to the tomb's underground palace.

meaning: current politics; political situation of the time
sentence: 他喜欢看时政新闻节目。
pinyin: Tā xǐhuān kàn shí zhèng xīnwén jiémù.
english: He likes watching current affairs news programs.

sentence: 这个岗位的工资下限是五千元。
pinyin: Zhège gǎngwèi de gōngzī xià xiàn shì wǔqiān yuán.
english: The lower bound of the salary for this position is five thousand yuan.

sentence: 社工帮助了许多有困难的家庭。
pinyin: Shè gōng bāngzhù le xǔduō yǒu kùnnán de jiātíng.
english: Social workers have helped many families in need.

sentence: 他在网上买东西受骗了，损失了不少钱。
pinyin: Tā zài wǎngshàng mǎi dōngxi shòupiàn le, sǔnshī le bù shǎo qián.
english: He got cheated while shopping online and lost quite a bit of money.
